interfaces.name: getHomePageSummary
interfaces.description: Get homepage content including brand intro, primary booking CTA context, quick links, featured services/packages/products, and recent articles.

target_page.description: Page to navigate when clicking primary CTA, e.g., 'booking', 'services'

default_context.description: Context hint for booking selector, e.g., 'home_office', 'whole_home'

interfaces.name: getServiceCategories
interfaces.description: List high-level service categories for the Services and Virtual Services pages.

interfaces.name: listServicesAndPackages
interfaces.description: List services and packages for a given category on the Services page with filters and sorting.

parameters.name: serviceCategoryId
parameters.description: ServiceCategory ID when browsing services, e.g., 'home_office', 'closet_wardrobe_organization'.

parameters.name: packageCategoryId
parameters.description: PackageCategory ID when browsing packages, e.g., 'closet_wardrobe_organization'.

parameters.name: minTotalHours
parameters.description: Minimum total_hours for packages; used for filters such as total hours >= 10.

interfaces.name: getBookableServicesAndPackages
interfaces.description: Get a simplified list of bookable services and packages for the Booking entry page triggered from 'Book Now'.

interfaces.name: getBookingOptions
interfaces.description: Get booking options (service or package details plus session options) for the Booking page header.

parameters.name: serviceId
parameters.description: Service ID when booking an individual service, e.g., home office decluttering.

parameters.name: packageId
parameters.description: Package ID when booking a multi-session or multi-hour package.

interfaces.name: getAvailabilitySlots
interfaces.description: Search available booking slots for a service or package with optional date, time window, and sorting.

parameters.name: serviceId
parameters.description: Service ID when booking an individual service.

parameters.name: packageId
parameters.description: Package ID when booking a package.

parameters.name: sessionOptionId
parameters.description: SessionOption ID to restrict availability to a specific duration (e.g., 2-hour_session).

parameters.name: timeWindowStart
parameters.description: Optional start time in 'HH:MM' 24-hour format, e.g., '14:00' for 2:00 pm.

parameters.name: timeWindowEnd
parameters.description: Optional end time in 'HH:MM' 24-hour format, e.g., '17:00' for 5:00 pm.

parameters.name: maxPrice
parameters.description: Optional budget cap; slots more expensive than this may be excluded.

interfaces.name: getBookingPaymentOptions
interfaces.description: Get payment options applicable to direct bookings (e.g., pay_at_appointment, pay_online).

interfaces.name: createBooking
interfaces.description: Create a confirmed booking for a selected availability slot and optional session option.

parameters.name: sessionOptionId
parameters.description: SessionOption ID when booking an individual service with configurable duration.

interfaces.name: getPackageCategories
interfaces.description: List package categories for the Packages page.

interfaces.name: listPackages
interfaces.description: List packages for the Packages page with basic filters and sorting.

parameters.name: minBedrooms
parameters.description: Minimum number of bedrooms for filtering whole home packages.

parameters.name: maxBedrooms
parameters.description: Maximum number of bedrooms for filtering whole home packages.

interfaces.name: getPackageDetails
interfaces.description: Get detailed information about a specific package for the Package Detail page.

addon_price_filter_max.description: Maximum addon price to display in filter UI.

interfaces.name: previewPackageConfiguration
interfaces.description: Preview pricing and summary for a package configuration (bedrooms and selected add-ons) without modifying the cart.

parameters.name: bedrooms
parameters.description: Configured number of bedrooms; if omitted, defaults to package base.

parameters.name: selectedAddonIds
parameters.description: Array of AddonService IDs applied to this configuration.

interfaces.name: addPackageToCartFromConfiguration
interfaces.description: Add a configured package (including bedrooms and add-ons) to the cart, creating a PackageConfiguration internally.

interfaces.name: getProductCategories
interfaces.description: List product categories for the Shop Products page.

interfaces.name: getProductFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter ranges and options for products within a category.

interfaces.name: searchProducts
interfaces.description: Search and filter products for the Shop Products page.

interfaces.name: getProductDetails
interfaces.description: Get detailed information about a product for the Product Detail page.

interfaces.name: addProductToCart
interfaces.description: Add a product (with optional variant) to the cart, creating a cart if none exists.

interfaces.name: listVirtualCoachingBundles
interfaces.description: List virtual decluttering coaching bundles with filters for number of sessions and session length.

interfaces.name: getAssessmentInfo
interfaces.description: Get in-home assessment descriptive content for the Assessment page.

interfaces.name: submitAssessmentRequest
interfaces.description: Submit an in-home assessment request with home details and preferences.

interfaces.name: getBlogFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available blog categories, tags, and date filter presets for the Blog & Resources page.

interfaces.name: listArticles
interfaces.description: List blog articles with category, tag, and date filters plus sorting.

interfaces.name: getArticleDetails
interfaces.description: Get full article content for the Article Detail page, including related downloads.

interfaces.name: saveArticleToReadingList
interfaces.description: Save an article to the single-user reading list.

interfaces.name: getReadingList
interfaces.description: Get all articles saved to the reading list for the current user.

interfaces.name: removeReadingListItem
interfaces.description: Remove an article from the reading list.

interfaces.name: getDownloadDetails
interfaces.description: Get details of a downloadable resource for the Download Detail page.

interfaces.name: addDownloadToCart
interfaces.description: Add a downloadable resource to the cart (free or paid).

interfaces.name: getGiftCardOptions
interfaces.description: Get available gift card products (digital/physical), amount ranges, and design options for the Gift Cards page.

interfaces.name: addGiftCardToCart
interfaces.description: Configure a gift card (amount, design, occasion, names) and add it to the cart, creating a GiftCardConfiguration internally.

interfaces.name: getCart
interfaces.description: Get the current cart with all items, quantities, prices, shipping selections, and totals.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of a given cart item.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the cart.

interfaces.name: getShippingMethodsForCartItem
interfaces.description: Get available shipping methods for a specific cart item (e.g., physical products or physical gift cards).

interfaces.name: setCartItemShippingMethod
interfaces.description: Assign a shipping method to a cart item and recalculate totals.

interfaces.name: applyPromoCodeToCart
interfaces.description: Apply a promo/discount code to the current cart, validating against active PromoCode records.

interfaces.name: removePromoCodeFromCart
interfaces.description: Remove any applied promo code from the current cart.

interfaces.name: getCheckoutSummary
interfaces.description: Get a summary of items, shipping, discounts, and totals to display on the Checkout page.

interfaces.name: startCheckout
interfaces.description: Create an order from the current cart using customer contact details, preparing for payment.

interfaces.name: getPaymentOptions
interfaces.description: Get available payment methods for the Payment page.

interfaces.name: getPaymentSummary
interfaces.description: Get final order summary, including discounts and shipping, for the Payment page.

interfaces.name: submitPayment
interfaces.description: Submit payment for an order or confirm non-online payment methods, completing the purchase.

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About page including story, qualifications, service areas, and contact info.

interfaces.name: getPoliciesContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the Policies page including privacy, booking, shipping, and digital usage policies.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load the single-user cart from storage or create a new one if none exists.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recompute subtotal, shipping_total, discount_total, and total whenever cart items or promo codes change.

helperFunctions.name: _validatePromoCode
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to validate a promo code against PromoCode records and determine applicable discounts.

helperFunctions.name: _calculatePackagePrice
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to calculate pricing for a package configuration based on bedrooms and selected add-ons.

helperFunctions.name: _findAvailabilitySlots
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to query AvailabilitySlot records for a given service or package and date/time window.

helperFunctions.name: _createOrderFromCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to create an Order and corresponding OrderItems from the current Cart when checkout starts.

helperFunctions.name: _recordPayment
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to create a Payment record for an Order and update the Order status based on payment outcome.
